Class AbstractOpenAiProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.model.openai.autoconfigure.AbstractOpenAiProperties
Direct Known Subclasses:
OpenAiAudioSpeechProperties, OpenAiAudioTranscriptionProperties, OpenAiChatProperties, OpenAiCommonProperties, OpenAiEmbeddingProperties, OpenAiImageProperties, OpenAiModerationProperties
public class AbstractOpenAiProperties extends Object
Author:
Sebastien Deleuze
